2604.12898.title: BEAM: Bi-level Memory-adaptive Algorithmic Evolution for LLM-Powered Heuristic Design
2604.12898.paper_summary: Large Language Model-based Hyper Heuristic (LHH) has recently emerged as an efficient way for automatic heuristic design. However, most existing LHHs just perform well in optimizing a single function within a pre-defined solver. Their single-layer evolution makes them not effective enough to write a competent complete solver. While some variants incorporate hyperparameter tuning or attempt to generate complex code through iterative local modifications, they still lack a high-level algorithmic modeling, leading to limited exploration efficiency. To address this, we reformulate heuristic design as a Bi-level Optimization problem and propose \textbf{BEAM} (Bi-level Memory-adaptive Algorithmic Evolution). BEAM's exterior layer evolves high-level algorithmic structures with function placeholders through genetic algorithm (GA), while the interior layer realizes these placeholders via Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). We further introduce an Adaptive Memory module to facilitate complex code generation. To support the evaluation for complex code generation, we point out the limitations of starting LHHs from scratch or from code templates and introduce a Knowledge Augmentation (KA) Pipeline. Experimental results on several optimization problems demonstrate that BEAM significantly outperforms existing LHHs, notably reducing the optimality gap by 37.84\% on aggregate in CVRP hybrid algorithm design. BEAM also designs a heuristic that outperforms SOTA Maximum Independent Set (MIS) solver KaMIS.
2604.12898.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型基礎的超啟發式（LHH）最近已成為自動啟發式設計的一種有效方式。<lb/>然而，大多數現有的 LHH 僅在預定義求解器內優化單一函數方面表現良好。<lb/>它們的單層演化使其在撰寫合格的完整求解器方面不夠有效。<lb/>雖然一些變體結合了超參數調整或試圖通過迭代的局部修改生成複雜代碼，但它們仍然缺乏高層次的算法建模，導致探索效率有限。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們將啟發式設計重新構造為雙層優化問題，並提出 \textbf{BEAM}（雙層記憶自適應算法演化）。<lb/>BEAM 的外層通過遺傳算法（GA）演化具有函數佔位符的高層算法結構，而內層則通過蒙特卡羅樹搜索（MCTS）實現這些佔位符。<lb/>我們進一步引入了一個自適應記憶模塊，以促進複雜代碼的生成。<lb/>為了支持複雜代碼生成的評估，我們指出從頭開始或從代碼模板開始的 LHH 的局限性，並引入知識增強（KA）管道。<lb/>在幾個優化問題上的實驗結果顯示，BEAM 顯著超越現有的 LHH，特別是在 CVRP 混合算法設計中將最佳性差距總體減少了 37.84\%。<lb/>BEAM 還設計了一種超越 SOTA 最大獨立集（MIS）求解器 KaMIS 的啟發式。
2604.12898.author: Chuyang Xiang et.al.
2604.12898.authors: Chuyang Xiang, Yichen Wei, Jiale Ma, Handing Wang, Junchi Yan
